# Module 05 unlocked: Console task manager

Nice work, Blochi. Module 04 is complete.

Your next project is a working console task manager that can add tasks, list them, mark them as done, and quit cleanly.

## Methods to implement

1. `AddTask(List<string> tasks, string task)`
2. `ListTasks(List<string> tasks)`
3. `MarkDone(List<string> tasks, int index)`
4. `MenuLoop(List<string> tasks)`

Open `modules/05-console-app/Solution/Exercises.cs`, fill in those methods, and push your work when ready. The tests will validate your logic.
